plan_type_rationale: Sequential pipeline stages — populate feeds rag-index, rag-index feeds rag-search queries, all outputs feed report authoring. Each phase gates the next.

phases.name: Refresh Pipeline Artifacts
phases.description: Run populate.js to rebuild index.json and graph.json from latest source, then rebuild RAG vectors

tasks.description: Build dist/ from source to ensure all 7 fixes are compiled: cd C:/Users/willh/Desktop/CODEREF/coderef-core && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5
Refresh index.json and graph.json: node dist/src/cli/populate.js (run from coderef-core project root)
Rebuild RAG vectors: node dist/src/cli/rag-index.js --provider ollama --reset
tasks.success_criteria: rag-index.js exits 0; rag-vectors.sqlite populated with vector records

tasks.description: Confirm .coderef/index.json totalElements, elementType distribution, stale count, header coverage from fresh index
tasks.success_criteria: Can read and parse .coderef/index.json; totalElements present

phases.name: Run RAG Search Queries
phases.description: Execute the 4 prescribed rag-search queries with --max-tokens 4000

tasks.description: Query 1: node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js "module without capability metadata" --top-k 10 --max-tokens 4000
tasks.success_criteria: Returns JSON with top-k results; --max-tokens flag accepted without error

phases.name: Measure Metrics and Author Report
phases.description: Extract all baseline metrics from fresh index/graph/coverage artifacts, compare against prior baseline, write self-scan-report.md

tasks.description: Parse .coderef/index.json: totalElements, capability_populated, layer_populated, elementType != undefined count, stale count (headerStatus=stale), header coverage (headerStatus=defined)
tasks.success_criteria: All 7 metrics measured from fresh index

tasks.description: Parse .coderef/reports/coverage.json for test_coverage_pct (tested files / total files)
Check .coderef/rag-vectors.sqlite or rag-index.json for RAG vector count and health
tasks.success_criteria: Vector count and provider info extracted

tasks.description: Author coderef/working/coderef-core-self-scan-post-improvements/self-scan-report.md with all metrics, comparison table against prior baseline, RAG query results, and remaining gap analysis
tasks.success_criteria: Report file exists with all sections: Executive Summary, Metric Comparison Table, RAG Health, Query Results, Remaining Gaps

tasks.description: Commit self-scan-report.md and workorder files to main
tasks.success_criteria: git commit exits 0; pushed to origin/main
